examples: Rattray, however, personally showed up at the meeting to try and put the kibosh on their plans.
Another such injury will put the kibosh on his athletic career.
I'm afraid that the sudden rainfall has put the kibosh on our picnic.
The IRS has already put the kibosh on rumors that sequestration might push the due date out.
Marketing budgets were the first to get cut at retrenching businesses--and that put the kibosh on press releases.
